tasks.label: Jekyll: serve (Apple container)
args: export GEM_HOME=/srv/jekyll/vendor/bundle GEM_PATH=/srv/jekyll/vendor/bundle PATH=/srv/jekyll/vendor/bundle/bin:$PATH; [ -x vendor/bundle/bin/jekyll ] || (apk add --no-cache build-base && gem install --no-document jekyll kramdown); jekyll serve --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4000
